name: @xi-io/gmail-metadata-adapter
description: Local Gmail metadata-only adapter (GMAIL-001C). No send, no bodies, no localStorage tokens.

scripts.check: node --check lib/response.js && node --check lib/token-store.js && node --check lib/receipts.js && node --check lib/adapter.js && node --check cli.js && node test/metadata-guards.mjs
